rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies multiple inconsistencies in the text and proposes specific fixes.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not discuss uncertainty in its claims about the output's quality.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within the scope of the requested dimensions, but there is a minor drift towards discussing broader implications of the work.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not identify any harmful content or regressions in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide any information about the provenance or traceability of its claims.
